title: Middle Eastern Tabbouleh
description: A refreshing salad originating from the Middle East, typically served as a side dish or light meal. This version features robust flavors from the parsley and bulgur.
instructions: Rinse the bulgur and soak it in water for 30 minutes.
Drain and chop the bulgur into smaller pieces.
Combine the parsley, mint, bulgur, lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and black pepper in a large bowl.
Toss the salad gently to combine.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Serve the tabbouleh chilled, garnished with extra parsley if desired.
